title: AeroPulse: Real-time Air Quality Mapping
summary: A real-time geovisualization of air quality, surfacing the rhythms of pollution exposure across communities.

title: Seattle City Lights: Mapping Urban Illumination
summary: An interactive cartography of Seattle's nighttime light landscape, reading the city through its illuminated infrastructures.

title: MBTA Transit Equity Atlas
summary: An equity-focused web atlas of Boston's MBTA system, examining how transit access intersects with race, income, and opportunity.

title: Mapping Yi-Fu Tuan's Humanistic Geography
summary: A geo-narrative tribute to Yi-Fu Tuan, tracing the places, ideas, and itineraries that shaped humanistic geography.

title: Shifting LGBTQ+ Spaces
summary: A continuing inquiry into the geographies of LGBTQ+ life, charting how queer spaces emerge, persist, and disappear across time.

title: Archiving the Capitol Hill Organized Protest (CHOP)
summary: Critical and creative (un)mapping of the 2020 CHOP, weaving archival materials and oral histories into a layered geo-narrative of the protest space.
collaborators: With D. Koopman, J.-K. Jung, H. Sun, & C. Anderson

title: Shifting Queer Space in the United States (2000—2019)
summary: A web map of Damron Men's Travel Guide venues over two decades, charting the shifting geography of queer life across the United States.
collaborators: With Q. Zhang, Y. Xia, J. Huang, & L. Peng

title: COVID-19 Risk to Washington Workers
summary: A smart dashboard characterizing occupational risk to Washington workers during the COVID-19 economic recovery.
collaborators: With Marissa Baker & Kim England · UW Population Health Initiative

title: Novel Coronavirus Infection Map
summary: One of the earliest live dashboards of the COVID-19 pandemic, built in February 2020 and reported by BBC, National Geographic, and Anadolu Agency.
collaborators: With F. Xu, L. Kang, J. Ji, J. Ho, & S. Bao

title: University of Washington Virtual Tour
summary: An interactive virtual tour of UW's School of Environmental and Forest Sciences, blending 3D scenes with on-the-ground photography.

title: Damron Seattle: Mapping Queer Space
summary: A Seattle case study from the Damron Men's Travel Guide: locating decades of LGBTQ+ venues to recover a long-silenced urban history.

title: Global Refugee Atlas
summary: A National Geographic—funded atlas tracing global refugee flows and the geographies of displacement.
collaborators: With Jamon Van Den Hoek & Jennifer Alix-Garcia · National Geographic NGS-51699S-18

title: TWCA Water Calculator
summary: A geovisual analytic platform for the Turfgrass Water Conservation Alliance, helping turfgrass producers reason about regional water savings.
collaborators: Funded by Turfgrass Water Conservation Alliance

title: Goss Point Cloud Viewer
summary: A WebGL point cloud viewer for sharing high-resolution lidar scans on the open web.

title: Storymap.js
summary: A lightweight JavaScript library for telling place-based stories on web maps. Used in courses and community projects.

title: Oregon Water Atlas
summary: A digital collection and visualization of Oregon's water resources — winner of the Student Environment Challenge (Oregon Chapter, AWMA).

title: Sea Level Rise Induced Migration
summary: An award-winning visualization of how sea level rise reshapes coastal migration patterns in the United States. Grand Prize, Ecological Visualization Contest.

title: GEEViz: Google Earth Engine Geovisualization
summary: A web platform for exploring planetary-scale Google Earth Engine datasets through interactive geovisual analytics.
collaborators: Supported by Google Cloud Platform · with H. Friedrich

title: Stand with #StandingRock
summary: An epistemological experiment in geospatial big data during the post-truth era, supporting the land claims of Sioux tribes through critical mapping.
collaborators: With Yuanyuan Tian, Shaozeng Zhang, & Shenliang Chen

title: H.J. Andrews Experimental Forest Point Cloud
summary: A web point-cloud visualization of the H.J. Andrews Experimental Forest headquarters area, built from terrestrial lidar.
